title: LifeSmart CT Dimming LED Driver （7W/CoSS) LS261A7
description:
Work with smart station , CT Dimming LED Driver （CoSS）is a specially customized power supply of 
LifeSmart, built in the CoSS dimming module developed by LifeSmart, using the 
industry-leading digital electrodeless dimming technology. With the drive, Tun_x005f_x0002_able White lamps are capable of a single light and single control. Whether installed or controlled, this combination provides an excellent experience for users.
